narrative:
Green Springs (precinct in Sandusky County) has 402 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
